title: Fix local interface param in param map

features.name: interface with integer parameter
features.description: Code should include an interface definition with an integer parameter that has a default value

features.name: dotted interface parameter reference in parameter map
features.description: Code should include an interface instance with a parameter override using a dotted reference to another interface's parameter

features.name: lint_off HIERPARAM directive
features.description: Code should include a lint_off directive for HIERPARAM warning

features.name: interface parameter to localparam via dotted reference
features.description: Code should include a localparam assigned from a dotted interface parameter reference

features.name: interface instance with parameter override
features.description: Code should include an interface instance created with a parameter override using a localparam
features.snippet:
localparam int LOCAL_INTF_FOO = local_intf.FOO;
intf #(.FOO(LOCAL_INTF_FOO)) the_intf_a ();
